preflight.note: Migrated the pre-ledger production-readiness plan into the work ledger as item 011. Closed phases PR-001 through PR-005 are recorded as history in README.md and _audit/. The acceptance criteria below cover only the remaining unstarted work (PR-006 through PR-016), which this entry is created before resuming.

acceptance_criteria.text: Harden backend lifecycle: detect port conflicts, dynamic ports where appropriate, bounded crash restarts, diagnostics, clean shutdown, with process lifecycle tests and user-facing recovery instructions.
Complete contacts: edit/delete confirmation, duplicate merge, CSV import/export, and contact selection during composition.
Complete media: previews, upload progress, cancellation, validation errors, download/open controls, and retention cleanup.
Complete notifications and deep links: clicking a notification opens the correct conversation; background and focus behavior are tested.
Add single-instance behavior: a second launch focuses the first app and cannot start a competing backend.
Expand security verification: proxy-aware webhook signature tests, local API threat tests, secret scanning, dependency scanning, and diagnostic redaction tests.
Complete accessibility: keyboard-only navigation, focus restoration, screen-reader labels, WCAG AA contrast, zoom, reduced motion, and high-contrast behavior.
Build the test pyramid: backend HTTP integration tests, renderer interaction tests, Electron lifecycle tests, installer tests, and opt-in Twilio sandbox/live tests.
Establish releases: real icon, signed installer, version metadata, release notes, checksums, update strategy, rollback, and reproducible release checklist.
Add support diagnostics: user-triggered health report with versions and status while excluding credentials, messages, contacts, and media by default.
Decide Voice scope: design and implement Twilio Voice as a separately tested surface or explicitly reject it from the roadmap. Do not restore the legacy iframe implementation.
